title: Add WhatsApp Button, Call Now Button, and Visit Centre Button with Business Details

requirements.text: Add a floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom-right corner of every page that opens a WhatsApp chat with the number 9102171138. The button should be clearly visible and use the standard WhatsApp green color with the WhatsApp icon.
acceptanceCriteria: A floating WhatsApp button is visible on all pages in the bottom-right corner
Clicking the button opens WhatsApp (wa.me/919102171138) in a new tab
The button displays the WhatsApp icon and is styled in WhatsApp green

requirements.text: Add a 'Call Now' button/link in the header, footer, and/or Documentation page hero section that triggers a phone call to 9102171138 (tel:9102171138) when clicked.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Call Now' button is present and visible on the Documentation page and footer
Clicking the button initiates a phone call to 9102171138 via tel: link
The phone number 9102171138 is displayed alongside the button

requirements.text: Add a 'Visit Centre' button/section in the Documentation page and footer that displays the business address: Kajichak Dhelbagosain Road, Barh, Patna, Bihar - 803213. The button or section should clearly show the full address so users know where to visit.

quotes: business adress kajichak dhelbagosain road barh patna bihar 803213
Business Address: Kajichak Dhelbagosain Road, Barh, Patna, Bihar - 803213

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Visit Centre' button or address section is visible on the Documentation page
The full address 'Kajichak Dhelbagosain Road, Barh, Patna, Bihar - 803213' is displayed
The address is also present in the site footer under Contact info
The Visit Centre button/section is styled consistently with the rest of the page

constraints: Business address must be exactly: Kajichak Dhelbagosain Road, Barh, Patna, Bihar - 803213
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: No changes to existing service request forms or file upload functionality
No changes to admin panel or authentication flow
